description: Add customizable colors to highlights and bold text, with commands to convert styled Markdown to inline HTML. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.name: Style Obmd

name: Style Obmd

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
Initial release of Style Obmd for Obsidian.

Style Obmd adds customizable colors to highlights and bold text in Live Preview and Reading View. It also provides commands to convert styled Markdown into portable inline HTML.

See the [README](https://github.com/penyt/style-obmd#readme) for usage and installation instructions.
